summary: Governance/Compliance Assessment Feature - All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 6-step wizard with Governance at step 5, 55 questions configured.
passed_tests: 1. test_perfect_governance_score - 100% score with all positive answers
2. test_zero_governance_score - 0% score with all wrong answers
4. test_empty_governance_compliance - Backwards compatibility with empty dict
7. test_low_governance_downgrades_status - Critical issue added for score < 40
9. test_governance_in_response - Response structure includes governance object
10. test_readiness_includes_governance_score - Readiness has financial_score and governance_score
12. test_all_question_ids_valid - All gc_1 to gc_55 IDs are valid

wizard_steps.description: Assessment wizard has 6 steps instead of 5
wizard_steps.details: Steps: Company Info (1), P&L Data (2), Balance Sheet (3), Projections (4), Governance (5), Market Data (6)

governance_step_position.description: Governance tab is at position 5 (after Projections, before Market Data)

governance_questions_count.description: 55 governance questions configured in frontend and backend
governance_questions_count.details: Frontend: /app/frontend/src/config/governanceQuestions.js has 55 questions. Backend: GOVERNANCE_POSITIVE_ANSWERS has 55 entries

governance_categories.details: 31 unique categories including Corporate Structure, Promoter Background, Board Composition, etc.

backwards_compatibility.description: API works with empty or missing governance_compliance

governance_results_display.description: Results page shows governance score circle and breakdown

critical_code_review_comments: Governance scoring logic correctly calculates score based on positive answer matching
Blended score formula (60% financial + 40% governance) implemented correctly in determine_readiness_status()
Low governance score (<40) correctly adds critical issue and can downgrade status
Frontend wizard correctly shows 6 steps with Governance at position 5
All 55 questions have proper positiveAnswer mapping in both frontend and backend
test_credentials: Test user created dynamically and cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use API directly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance/Compliance feature fully tested. Backend API /api/assessment/calculate accepts governance_compliance dict and returns governance scoring. Frontend wizard has 6 steps with Governance at step 5. All 55 questions configured with Yes/No toggles. Blended scoring (60% financial + 40% governance) working correctly. Results page displays governance score circle and breakdown.
